title: Alchemical Emblems — Gallery 5
description: 40 emblems centered on the alchemical opus as spiritual journey. Mylius' Anatomia aurem vitelli, Maier's Atalanta fugiens, Ripley's scroll, Norton's Ordinal of Alchemy, and emblems of the philosophical tree, the green lion, the serpent ouroboros, and the celestial bride.
notes: Ripley scroll and Maier's Atalanta fugiens are highlights — alchemy as visionary art.
